Bash(python3 -c "
import asyncio, httpx, json
async def main\(\):
    # 先注册一个用户，再登录拿 token，最后请求 dashboard
    base = 'http://127.0.0.1:8000'
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(base_url=base, timeout=10\) as c:
        # 探测服务是否在线
        try:
            r = await c.get\('/api/v1/health'\)
            print\('health:', r.status_code, r.text[:120]\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\('server not up:', e\)
            return
        # 注册
        import random
        u = f'dash{random.randint\(1000,9999\)}'
        reg = await c.post\('/api/v1/auth/register', json={'username': u, 'email': f'{u}@qq.com', 'password': 'Abc12345'}\)
        print\('register:', reg.status_code\)
        if reg.status_code >= 400:
            # 已存在，尝试登录
            lg = await c.post\('/api/v1/auth/login', json={'username': u, 'password': 'Abc12345'}\)
            print\('login:', lg.status_code, lg.text[:120]\)
            token = lg.json\(\).get\('access_token'\)
        else:
            token = reg.json\(\).get\('access_token'\)
        if not token:
            print\('no token'\)
            return
        dash = await c.get\('/api/v1/dashboard', headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}\)
        print\('dashboard:', dash.status_code\)
        print\(json.dumps\(dash.json\(\), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:500]\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | head -60)

Bash(python3 -c "
import asyncio, asyncpg
async def main\(\):
    conn = await asyncpg.connect\('postgresql://dev:dev_pass@localhost:5432/agentforge', timeout=3\)
    for t in \('tasks','agents','skills','users','api_keys','conversations','execution_logs','messages'\):
        rows = await conn.fetch\(f\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='{t}' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\)
        print\(t, ':', [r['column_name'] for r in rows]\)
    await conn.close\(\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | head -20)
